## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (typecheck against the supported editor floor)
- [ ] `npm test` passes (grammar + server-resolution suites)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Behavior with a runtime effect was exercised in the Extension Development Host (F5)
- [ ] Commit messages are plain and imperative (no AI-assistant trailers)
- [ ] The deliberate version pins were not changed, or the PR explains why they had to be
